calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Vedica Puri, Clerk: Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Basalle Wong, is present.
Attorney, Gilbert Yee Jay, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Edward Xu, is present.
Attorney, Gary S. Williams, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 400 27th Avenue APt. 1, San Francisco, CA. The trial date of November 3,2 008 is vacated.
